name: Pineapple 'n' Ham Sandwich Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Container cream cheese (Pineapple flavor, softened)
1/8 teaspoon Pumpkin pie spice or ground cinnamon
6 oz Package thinly sliced ham (about 18 slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the cream cheese, chopped nuts, and pumpkin pie spice or ground cinnamon. Mix well.
2. Briefly cook each tortilla on both sides in a nonstick skillet for about 1 minute. Do not brown. Allow them to cool slightly.
3. Spread about one-sixth of the cream cheese mixture onto each tortilla, leaving at least half an inch from the edge.
4. Place 3 thin slices of ham over the cream cheese spread, overlapping across the center of the tortilla.
5. Top with 1 or 2 lettuce leaves.
6. Roll up each tortilla and wrap in plastic wrap.
